current_day_messages.text: This project is 'GauntletSandbox', which appears to be a CloudBrew landing page — a coffee-related product site. It includes an `index.html` (landing page), `styles.css`, `script.js`, a Flask backend (`app.py` with SQLite database for orders), and tests (`test_cloudbrew.py`). The site has a dark mode toggle, order modal with form validation, and API endpoints for pre-orders.
